name: chr20_20q11_21_pericentric_inversion
description: 20q11.21 SD-flanked region — site of the common polymorphic pericentric inv(20)(p12q11) and of recurrent 20q11.21 microdeletion / microduplication CNVs. Contains EYA2-related paralogs, CEP250 and TM9SF4; flanked by inverted SD pairs that mediate the inversion polymorphism.

architecture.internal_structure: Inverted SD pairs of ~100-300 kb at ~98-99% identity flanking the 20q11.21 interval; embedded in pericentric SD-enriched belt; recurrent ~1-2 Mb microdeletion/duplication described in ID/dysmorphism cohorts.
